div.h2: Selinger Algorithm: Subset Enumeration & Plan Combination

div.p: Color Key: 🟣 Purple: Size 1 (Single tables) 🔵 Blue: Size 2 (Two-table joins) 🟢 Green: Size 3 (Three-table joins) 🔴 Red: Size 4 (Full join / Result)
Arrow Types: ──▶ Combine to form larger subset ──▶ DP state transition

ul.li: Entry E[subset] stores only the cheapest plan for subset.
If multiple plans have same cost, prioritize by interesting orders.
